---
title: "Lecture 2: Bob is You"
date: "2026-05-21"
order: 3
description: "An integrated guide to the five dimensions — physical, mental, emotional, social, spiritual — and what the shape of you actually looks like on a radar plot. Also available as a [slide deck (PDF)](/assets/bob-is-you.pdf)."
categories: [bobbology, health, integration]
path: /bob-is-you.html
---

```{=html}
<p>Redirecting to <a href="/bob-is-you.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener">the article</a>…</p>
<script>window.location.replace("/bob-is-you.html");</script>
```
